results.answer_excerpt:
Key findings:

Billing has the longest average resolution time at 16.8 hours, followed by Account and Feature Request, both at 16.5 hours. Onboarding and Outage have the shortest resolution times, both averaging 14.9 hours. Across the 300 rows analyzed and 6 ticket categories, the spread between fastest and slowest is about 1.9 hours—roughly 13% of the overall average resolution time of 15.9 hours.

What this may indicate:
